description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 13 (Friday), graduation ceremonies were held at junior high schools throughout the city. I attended the Hanno Municipal Kaji Junior High School graduation ceremony as a guest and offered congratulatory remarks.

Dear graduates, congratulations on your graduation.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13321.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Municipal Kaji Junior High School 47th Graduation Ceremony
